# Call notes template

Drop this format into a new note for every meeting. The AI uses the headings to extract structured data into the right places.

```markdown
# [YYYY-MM-DD] Call with <name / company>

**Attendees:** ...
**Client:** [link to clients page](../people/clients.md)
**Source transcript:** [link](../transcripts/index.md)

## Summary

One paragraph.

## Decisions

- ...

## Action items

- [ ] ... — owner: ... — due: ...

## Open questions

- ...
```

After the call, ask the AI: _"Process this note. File decisions to the [decisions log](../actions/decisions.md), actions to the [tracker](../actions/index.md), and update the [client page](../people/clients.md)."_
